notes: Can function as a predicate adjective (sich bewusst sein + Genitiv = to be aware of something) or as an attributive adjective. Also used as an adverb meaning 'deliberately' or 'consciously'.

sentences.german: Er ist sich der Gefahr bewusst.
sentences.english: He is aware of the danger.

sentences.german: Sie hat bewusst auf Zucker verzichtet.
